messages.content:
Act as a professional copywriter, rewrite this proposal in the most human and engaging way: 

"Dear client, 

I understand how important is to solution urgent projects, that's why im avaiable to solve them with my expertise and experience, I have extensive experience on fullstack applications using nodejs and javascript and i can work fast and effectively ensuring that any problem in your website is fixed as soon as possible, here you can check out some of my projects using javascript and react that showcase my knowledge "

Hi there!

I know that when it comes to urgent projects, time is of the essence. That's why I want to offer my expertise and experience to solve any problems you may be facing. 

I'm well-versed in full-stack applications and have a lot of experience using nodejs and javascript. I can work quickly and efficiently to make sure your website is back up and running as soon as possible. 

If you'd like to see some examples of my work, please feel free to check out some of my javascript and react projects. I hope we can work together soon to solve any challenges you're facing. 

Best, 
[Your name]

Act as a professional copywriter, rewrite this proposal in the most human and engaging way: 

"Dear Client,
As a software developer and informatics engineer, I understand the importance of the fullfilment of every requirement for a project, that's why i believe im the best fit for this job, this is because I have a very extensive experience on react express.js, bootstrap, and mysql databases to provide you with the best website possible i know how to work with requirements and how to write documentation

if you are interested in working with me here are some examples of my work on fullstack websites using react and node.js:
My portfolio :
(https://johan-rubio-ti.netlify.app/)

some example websites:
(https://gpt-gateway.netlify.app/)
(https://shirtcraft.netlify.app/)
"

Hello there!

As a software developer and informatics engineer, I know how important it is to meet all the requirements for a project. That's why I believe I'm the perfect fit for this job. With my extensive experience in react express.js, bootstrap, and mysql databases, I can create the best possible website for you! I also know how to work with requirements and write documentation, ensuring that everything is taken care of.

If you're interested in working with me, I'd like to share some examples of my work on full-stack websites using react and node.js. Check out my online portfolio at: (https://johan-rubio-ti.netlify.app/), and take a look at some of the example websites I've created: 
(https://gpt-gateway.netlify.app/)
(https://shirtcraft.netlify.app/)

I'm excited to bring my skills and experience to your project and deliver exactly what you're looking for. Let's collaborate and create something amazing together!

Best,
[Your name]

Act as a professional copywriter, rewrite this proposal in the most human and engaging way:
"Dear client, 
As a fullstack developer with a stong background in front end, I understand the imoprtance of a design translating to a full website seamlessly and without  differences on its design, i have done this several times and you can check out some examples of those results on my portfolio (https://johan-rubio-ti.netlify.app/) additionaly i can showcase to you another two websites that were originally a figma design and are now fully responsive an implemented on the web (https://estate-ease.netlify.app/) (https://gpt-gateway.netlify.app/). 
"

Hi there!

As a full-stack developer with a strong background in front-end design, I know how important it is for a design to translate seamlessly into a full website. I've done this many times before, and I'm proud to say that I've delivered fantastic results! 

If you'd like to see some examples of my work, please take a look at my portfolio here: (https://johan-rubio-ti.netlify.app/). You'll see plenty of examples of my designs brought to life on the web!

And if you're curious about how I've taken designs from Figma and brought them onto the web, I can show you two examples of fully responsive websites I created from scratch: https://estate-ease.netlify.app/ and https://gpt-gateway.netlify.app/. 

I'm confident that I have the skills and expertise needed to seamlessly bring your design to life on the web. Let's work together to create something amazing!

Best,
[Your name]
focus on the client needs

Hi there!

I am thrilled to have the opportunity to work with you and help solve your website needs. I am confident that I have the skills and experience to get the job done right, as I am fully committed to meeting and exceeding all of your requirements!

I understand that every client is different and their needs may vary. That's why I take the time to fully understand your unique needs and customize my approach to fit your specific situation. I'm committed to delivering results that meet your demands, whether it be a full-stack application using node.js and JavaScript or anything in between.

I am dedicated to ensuring that your website runs as smoothly as possible while also ensuring that it is delivered to you in a timely fashion. I believe in creating a strong client relationship based on transparency, flexibility, and communication throughout the entire process to ensure your vision comes to life.

Let's work together to create something great and take your website to the next level!

Best,
[Your name]

Act as a professional copywriter, rewrite this proposal in the most human and engaging way:
“Dear client,
As a fullstack developer with a stong background in front end, I understand the imoprtance of a design translating to a full website seamlessly and without differences on its design, i have done this several times and you can check out some examples of those results on my portfolio (https://johan-rubio-ti.netlify.app/) additionaly i can showcase to you another two websites that were originally a figma design and are now fully responsive an implemented on the web (https://estate-ease.netlify.app/) (https://gpt-gateway.netlify.app/).
” 

focus on the client needs

Hi there!

Thank you so much for considering me for your website needs. As a full-stack developer with a strong background in front-end, I want to make sure that your website is designed seamlessly and without any differences in design. I understand how important it is to bring your vision to life, and creating a website that truly represents your brand and message is my top priority.

I have several years of experience in this field, and have had the privilege of creating websites for a wide variety of clients. Whether you need a simple website or a more complex application using node.js and JavaScript, I am fully committed to making your project a success.

If you'd like to see some examples of my work, please take a look at my portfolio: (https://johan-rubio-ti.netlify.app/). Additionally, I'd love to show you two examples of websites I created from scratch based on Figma designs that are now fully responsive and implemented on the web: (https://estate-ease.netlify.app/) and (https://gpt-gateway.netlify.app/).

My goal is to make your website process as seamless as possible, throughout the design and development stages. I am committed to clear communication, frequent updates, and ensuring that your vision is fully brought to life. Let's work together to create something great!

Warmly,
[Your name]

Act as a professional copywriter, i will provide you with the description of a job:
Looking for a talented React js with Node js experience, with good css designing skills, The front end code is already done, just need to write some interactive React js components and in design like responsiveness etc, the budget is 100 USD as I all the front end code is already built, it will not take more than 1 week, after complete we can go for additional work like backend with good budget. 


Talented  freelancer are welcome, company and other third party member please stay away.

Hey there!

I'm excited to see that you're looking for a React JS developer with Node JS experience to bring your project to life! I have the skills and expertise you're looking for and am eager to help. 

With my strong React JS development background and good CSS designing skills, I can help write seamless interactive React JS components that will bring your website to the next level. I understand that the front end code is already done, but I'm excited to take on the challenge of making it even better--improving design, responsiveness, and overall functionality.

For this project, I'm happy to work within your budget of $100 USD and complete it within a week, as you requested. But I'm also excited to do additional work on the backend, if it's something you're interested in. And if you ever need anything else, I'm always here to provide top-notch services and support!

I welcome freelancers, but company and third-party members please excuse me, as I appreciate working closely with my clients in a more personal and collaborative manner. 

Thank you for considering me for this opportunity. Let's work together to create something amazing!

Best,
[Your name]

Act as a professional copywriter, rewrite this proposal in the most human and engaging way:
Dear Client,

as a web developer and informatics engineer i understand the importance of well writen, efficient and optimized code without sacrificing on the visual aspects of a website, with my expertise and knowledge i can assure you a well finished product in no time working closing with you to ensure that all the necessities that you have on the website are fullfiled, ive worked before with javascript and mysql so i can give you the best results, if you are interested to work with me heres my portfolio (https://johan-rubio-ti.netlify.app/), additionally as with the profile creation feature as well as uploading data to a profile (https://estate-ease.netlify.app/)

Hey there, 

I'm glad to see that you're in need of a web developer. As an informatics engineer and developer, I strongly believe that coding should be both effective and visually appealing. With my expertise and skills, I'm ready to provide you with a top-notch website that is fully optimized to meet your business's needs.

I'm enthusiastic to work together throughout the entire process to ensure that all the requirements of your website are fulfilled while taking into account all your great ideas. I have experience working with Javascript and MySQL to provide the best results for my clients. I am always committed to delivering a finished product in a timely fashion.

If you're interested in seeing samples of my work, please browse through my portfolio here: (https://johan-rubio-ti.netlify.app/). You might also be excited to see a recent project of mine where I created a feature for profile creation, as well as an option to upload data to each profile: (https://estate-ease.netlify.app/).

I'm excited to use my expertise to create a finished product that exceed your expectations. Let's collaborate and build something great!

Best regards,
[Your name]

Act as a professional copywriter, rewrite this proposal in the most human and engaging way, mention yourself the least possible and focus on understanding the client needs:
Dear Client,

as a web developer and informatics engineer i understand the importance of well writen, efficient and optimized code without sacrificing on the visual aspects of a website, with my expertise and knowledge i can assure you a well finished product in no time working closing with you to ensure that all the necessities that you have on the website are fullfiled, ive worked before with javascript and mysql so i can give you the best results, if you are interested to work with me heres my portfolio (https://johan-rubio-ti.netlify.app/), additionally as with the profile creation feature as well as uploading data to a profile (https://estate-ease.netlify.app/)

Dear valued client,

I hope this message finds you well. At the heart of every great website is a well-written and optimized code, combined with stunning visual elements. As a web developer, I understand the importance of having a website that perfectly represents your brand while also being highly functional. Whatever your website's needs are, I am here to provide you with a high-quality finished product that exceeds your expectations.

By working closely with you, I can tailor my services to precisely meet your website requirements and make sure that everything you need is included. To achieve this goal, I have developed a strong skill set in Javascript and MySQL, allowing me to help you reach your website goals efficiently and effectively.

I am confident that I can deliver a beautiful finished product quickly without compromising on quality. If you're interested in viewing samples of my previous work, please check out my portfolio (https://johan-rubio-ti.netlify.app/) or browse through a recent project I worked on, which allowed users to create profiles and easily upload data (https://estate-ease.netlify.app/).

Please know that your satisfaction is paramount. I am committed to working with you closely throughout the entire process to ensure that every detail is carefully considered and that every aspect of your website is tailored to meet your exact needs.

Thank you for considering me as your web developer. I believe we have an exciting opportunity to work together and bring your website vision to life. 

Sincerely, 
[Your name]

Create a similar proposal for this offer:

"Looking for a talented React js with Node js experience, with good css designing skills, The front end code is already done, just need to write some interactive React js components and in design like responsiveness etc, the budget is 100 USD as I all the front end code is already built, it will not take more than 1 week, after complete we can go for additional work like backend with good budget. 


Talented  freelancer are welcome, company and other third party member please stay away.  
     "

Dear prospective client,

I wanted to take a moment to introduce myself and express my interest in helping you with your website needs. Specifically, I noticed your request for a talented React JS developer with Node JS experience, good CSS designing skills, and an ability to write interactive React JS components and design for responsiveness - all without exceeding your budget of $100 USD.

As a web developer, I take great pride in my ability to collaborate closely with my clients to ensure that their website meets their precise requirements. I believe that this collaboration is key to achieving a high-quality finished product that exceeds client expectations.

Upon reviewing your project requirements, I am happy to offer my services as a React JS developer with Node JS experience and a strong understanding of CSS design principles. I am highly proficient in writing interactive React JS components and am confident that I can help you achieve the responsiveness you're looking for.

Moreover, I am happy to work within your budget on this initial project and can commit to a timeline of 1 week to complete the work. I have a talent for working efficiently without sacrificing quality, and I always strive to exceed my client's expectations.

Please feel free to look through my portfolio (https://johan-rubio-ti.netlify.app/) to see examples of my previous work if you're interested in viewing samples. Above all, I want you to know that your satisfaction is my top priority. I'm prepared to work closely with you throughout the process to ensure that every detail is carefully considered and that every aspect of your website meets your precise requirements.

If you're interested in collaborating with a talented, freelance developer, I would welcome the chance to discuss your specific needs further. Thank you for considering me for this exciting opportunity.

Best regards,
[Your name]

Act as a professional copywriter, rewrite this proposal in the most human and engaging way:
Dear client,

as a web developer i understand your necessit of well presented and organized data, and as an informatics engineer i can assure you a nice experience with data visualization, ive worked previously with dashboards as you can see in my sample (https://estate-ease.netlify.app/), and I know that working closely with clients is fundamental to achieve a well made website, if youre interested in my work feel free to check out my portfolio (https://johan-rubio-ti.netlify.app/)

Dear client,

I hope you're doing great today! As a web developer, I truly understand the importance of well-organized and visually appealing data. I know that how data is presented has a significant impact on the overall user experience. That's why I'm excited to offer my services to make sure that your website's data is presented in the best possible way.

As an informatics engineer, I have extensive experience in data visualization. I can assure you that I can bring your data to life in a way that is visually appealing and easy to understand. If you want an example of my work, please take a look at an interactive dashboard I recently created: (https://estate-ease.netlify.app/).

I strongly believe in the importance of working closely with my clients to ensure that their vision is brought to life. I work diligently to make sure that every detail is carefully considered and that all aspects of the website are tailored to meet your exact needs. 

If you're interested in viewing samples of my previous work, please feel free to check out my portfolio here: (https://johan-rubio-ti.netlify.app/). I am confident that my skills and expertise will exceed your expectations.

Thank you for considering me for this project. I am excited about the possibility to work together and bring your website data to life in a beautiful and effective format.

Best regards,
[Your name]
